subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-26 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: It is my hope that Persia, too, may attain order and stability, achieve renown, and be granted mighty confirmations
subcodes.first_line_orig: امید است ایران هم سر وسامانی یابد صوت و صدائی پیدا کند و تأیید شدید جوید
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer, @mindfulness; concentration; focus, @law of transformation and change
